basic_details.job_title: LBSH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital (LBSH Delhi) Junior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 12-05-2026 on the official website of Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the LBSH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 33 years Age relaxation is allowed for SC/ST and OBC/PH candidates as per rules. OBC certificate issued from Govt. NCT of Delhi only will be considered.

qualification.education_qualification: Application should possess a valid degree from a recognized institution and should be registered with Delhi Medical council.
qualification.details: Application should possess a valid degree from a recognized institution and should be registered with Delhi Medical council. Valid degree from a recognized institution. Registered with Delhi Medical Council. Completed internship during the last two years, calculated from 15-05-2026.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 10 of Pay Matrix plus usual allowances as applicable under the Residency Scheme
salary_details.details: Level 10 of Pay Matrix plus usual allowances as applicable under the Residency Scheme.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for LBSH Delhi Junior Resident (Medical) posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Resident (Medical) posts at Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital is scheduled for 15th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they are present at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Resident (Medical) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Junior Resident (Medical) position at Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital, Delhi, as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Resident (Medical) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a valid degree from a recognized institution, be registered with the Delhi Medical Council, and have completed their internship within the last two years, calculated from 15th May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Junior Resident (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Resident (Medical) post is 33 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC/PH candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident (Medical) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary as per Level 10 of the Pay Matrix, along with usual allowances applicable under the Residency Scheme.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Resident (Medical) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are advised to be prepared for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, internship completion certificate, Delhi Medical Council registration, and category certificate (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for LBSH Delhi Junior Resident (Medical) recruitment 2026 being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital, Delhi. The exact venue details and reporting time will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Junior Resident (Medical) position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Resident (Medical) position is Ad-hoc, meaning it is a temporary appointment.
